name: forgeflow-mini
description: Brain-driven development plugin — 14 skills, FTS5 + spreading activation, auto-episode capture, brain-consult (3-mode Q&A), subagent dispatch, TDD micro-step planning, 9 hooks, circuit breaker

skills.name: brain-dev
skills.description: Primary entry point — classifies ANY request (~500 tokens, 0 DB), extracts retrieval keywords, routes to brain-plan/brain-consult/brain-task

skills.name: brain-init
skills.description: Initialize Brain for any project (scan > generate > review > persist > hooks > index > state > env-check)

skills.name: brain-task
skills.description: Full task orchestration — circuit breaker, context assembly, implementation, verification, auto-episode capture, archival

skills.name: brain-map
skills.description: ContextMapper — FTS5 + spreading activation for associative sinapse retrieval

skills.name: brain-plan
skills.description: Planner — Phase 0 Q&A + Cortex-Linked TDD plans with micro-steps, file structure design, sinapse linking, and self-review gates

skills.name: brain-verify
skills.description: 6-phase verification — build, types, lint, tests, security, diff review

skills.name: brain-eval
skills.description: Define success criteria before implementation — capability and regression evals

skills.name: brain-consult
skills.description: Brain-informed consultation — answers questions using brain context (sinapses, conventions) without full task orchestration. 3 modes: Quick, Research (+docs), Consensus (+Codex). Auto-captures episodes on corrections.

skills.name: brain-mckinsey
skills.description: Strategic intelligence — internal scoring + external research for high-stakes decisions

skills.name: brain-document
skills.description: Documenter — propose sinapse updates after task completion, auto-capture episodes for anti-patterns

skills.name: brain-consolidate
skills.description: Consolidation cycle — process episodes into approval-gated sinapse updates, batch review, escalate patterns to conventions

skills.name: brain-status
skills.description: Health dashboard — display Brain stats, episode counts, and regenerate 3D visualization

skills.name: brain-codex-review
skills.description: Codex code review agent — validates implementation, finds bugs, checks conventions

skills.name: brain-setup
skills.description: Interactive configuration wizard for brain.config.json — browse, edit, validate, and diff all Brain settings
